string.text: Word from a runner: a Monolith expedition got ambushed deep in the south. Their truck stopped rolling somewhere out there and the bodies are still on it. If it's true, half the Zone is converging on that wreck right now — every faction wants what the fanatics were carrying. Bring spare mags.
A PDA recovered from a dead Monolith stalker. Its last recorded entry describes destination coordinates and warns of multiple hostile factions converging on the area. The final entry is cut short.
